title: Zhejiang Hisun Pharma Company Ltd. - Canada.ca
content:
## Zhejiang Hisun Pharma Company Ltd.
Health Canada has requested Canadian importers and distributors to voluntarily quarantine drugs imported from Zhejiang Hisun Pharma Company Ltd., in Zhejiang, China, due to data integrity concerns.
This list is based on the most recent information received by Health Canada as of June 11, 2015, from various importers and companies and includes information submitted to Health Canada as part of the licensing process. The list will continue to be updated as new information becomes available.
Drug Identification Number
Fresenius Kabi Canada
Fresenius Kabi Canada
Cladribine Injection
Fresenius Kabi Canada
Fludarabine Phosphate Injection
Pharmaceutical Partners of Canada
Bleomycin for Injection
